title: Daily Plan
description: Pre-market plan written by the Claude Routine. Consumed by main.py at bot startup.

date.description: Trading date this plan applies to, YYYY-MM-DD (IST).

version.description: Plan schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the routine wrote this plan.

regime_hint.description: Claude's read on macro/market regime for the day.

risk_overrides.description: Runtime caps for today. Bot clamps to settings.py caps; never loosens them.

watchlist.description: Up to 10 symbols Claude picked for today, with per-symbol bias.

bias.description: long = only BUY signals; short = only SELL; both = either; avoid = skip entirely.

conviction.description: 1 = low conviction, 5 = high. Currently informational; may influence sizing later.

notes.description: Free-text rationale: catalyst, levels, what would invalidate.

rationale.description: Short overall rationale. Mirrors the Pre-Market journal section.

lessons_applied.description: Prior-day #lesson tags this plan is applying.
